zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle於1543年出生在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素時，她的父親Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle36歲，母親Lady Mary Brandon33歲。她於1568年與Sir John Clifton在英國英格蘭戴文巴普頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle于1543年出生在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle36岁，母亲Lady Mary Brandon33岁。她于1568年与Sir John Clifton在英国英格兰戴文巴普頓结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年在英国英格兰薩默塞特布普頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle was born in 1543, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle, was 36 and her mother, Lady Mary Brandon, was 33. She married Sir John Clifton in 1568, in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1591, in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle est née en 1543, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Brandon, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Clifton en 1568, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1591, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1568 in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir John Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle è nata il nel 1543 nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Brandon, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Clifton nel 1568, nel Bampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1591, nel Brympton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Barrington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagleが1543年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagleは36歳，母Lady Mary Brandonは33歳であった。1568年にイギリスイギリスデボンバンプトンでSir John Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトバーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle(이)가 1543년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Brandon(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바프턴에서 Sir John Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 배링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle nasceu em 1543, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Brandon, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Clifton em 1568, em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1591, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle родилась в 1543 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Brandon, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Clifton в 1568 г. в местности бамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1591 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Stanley Baroness Monteagle nació en 1543, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Brandon, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir John Clifton en 1568, en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1591, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
